sketches.mechanism: Ownership move semantics: assigning a non-Copy value transfers ownership, and using the original binding afterward is a compile-time error.
sketches.resonance: What is truly given away cannot also remain available to the giver.

sketches.mechanism: Automatic storage duration: a local variable ceases to exist when its function returns, so returning its address creates a dangling pointer and undefined behavior.
sketches.resonance: A moment carried out of the place that held it becomes impossible to safely touch.

sketches.mechanism: An ensure clause runs during method exit even when a return has already been chosen.
sketches.resonance: Some traces are left not before departure, but because departure happens.
